package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/driver/postgres"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for service_constructor_instantiates_dependencies_internally:
// constructor creates repositories, clients, or loggers internally instead of
// accepting them explicitly.
type OrderService struct {
	db     *gorm.DB
	client *http.Client
	logger *log.Logger
}

func NewOrderService(dsn string) (*OrderService, error) {
	db, err := gorm.Open(postgres.Open(dsn), &gorm.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to connect database: %w", err)
	}

	client := &http.Client{}
	logger := log.New(nil, "[order-service] ", log.LstdFlags)

	return &OrderService{
		db:     db,
		client: client,
		logger: logger,
	}, nil
}

type Order struct {
	ID     string
	Status string
	Amount int
}

func (s *OrderService) CreateOrder(ctx context.Context, order *Order) error {
	s.logger.Printf("creating order for %s", order.ID)
	result := s.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(order)
	return result.Error
}
